title: Southern blotting probes for HBV genotype D
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ejjd","text":"Southern blotting probes for HBV genotype D.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"arh49","text":"HBV cccDNA, rcDNA, and dslDNA can be detected by these probes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"46j44","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tar3h","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":{}},{"key":"wwiwg","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"dii5r","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"image","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"615035D1341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","height":null,"is_image":true,"is_video":false,"legend":"{\"blocks\":[{\"key\":\"bj2b6\",\"text\":\"Southern blotting data( HIRT DNA of Hep38.7 stable cell line).\",\"type\":\"unstyled\",\"depth\":0,\"inlineStyleRanges\":[],\"entityRanges\":[],\"data\":{}}],\"entityMap\":{}}","mime":"image/png","original_name":"HBV SB.png","placeholder":"","source":"https://content.protocols.io/bccja.png","width":520}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"c9i1","text":"Prepare the template DNA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8oem9","text":"Hep38.7 (HBV genotype D stable cell line) supernatant is best template.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"airql","text":"HIRT DNA and whole DNA are not goot for the template (genome DNA induce the unspecific amplification).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"5edug","text":"For the template, virus genome is used.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3t9bg","text":"Please be careful for using virus genome.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Prepare the 9 tubes (ccc1-9 probes) and mix the reagent (DO NOT mix other primer set.For example, ccc1 fwd and ccc3 rev. %s %s
PCR product is purified by ethanol purification and gel extraction.
